Bash(python -c "import json; data=json.load\(open\('anime_index.json'\)\); [print\(s\) for s in data if 'paradise' in str\(s\).lower\(\)]")
Bash(python -c "import json; data=json.load\(open\('anime_index.json'\)\); [print\(s['name'], s['version']\) for s in data if isinstance\(s, dict\) and 'paradise' in s.get\('name',''\).lower\(\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(i['repository']['full_name'], i['path']\) for i in d.get\('items',[]\)]")
Bash(python3 -c " import sys,json d=json.load\(sys.stdin\) for i in d.get\('items',[]\): print\(i['full_name'], '-', i.get\('description',''\), '-', i['updated_at']\) ")
Bash(python3 -c " import sys,json d=json.load\(sys.stdin\) for i in d.get\('items',[]\): print\(i['repository']['full_name'], '-', i['path']\) ")
Bash(python3 -c " import sys,json d=json.load\(sys.stdin\) print\('total:', d.get\('total_count'\)\) for i in d.get\('items',[]\): print\(i['repository']['full_name'], '-', i['path']\) ")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(d['name']\) for d in data]")

Bash(python3 -c " import json, sys data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) trees = data.get\('tree', []\) js_files = [t['path'] for t in trees if t['path'].endswith\('.js'\) and 'anime' in t['path'].lower\(\)] print\('\\n'.join\(js_files[:40]\)\) ")
